SCI-2245.notes: Radiation analysis complete. Identifying isotope signatures from debris. Recommending expanded containment perimeter.

ORE-3312.notes: Structural integrity confirmed stable. Operations resuming at reduced capacity. Monitoring radiation dispersal.

COU-5521.notes: Bay 3 containment field holding steady. Structural engineer conducting detailed assessment. Pressure stability nominal.

ESC-8643.notes: Debris mapping 47% complete. Identified three high-velocity fragments on collision course with outer docking ring. Coordinating with station defense.

COU-5016.notes: Second hull breach sealed. Structural integrity now 58%. Crew reports secondary fire in aft compartment. Emergency suppression systems engaged.

SAL-3188.notes: Debris recovery commenced. Tractor beam secured first wreckage section. Radiation levels within acceptable limits for salvage operations.

ESC-3217.notes: Decontamination procedures initiated. Crew standby in sealed compartments. Status update delayed due to contamination protocols.

ESC-611.notes: Debris field scan detected no life signatures. Hazmat dispersal pattern monitored. Weapons systems remain powered down.

COU-2967.notes: Inbound transmission received. Requesting clearance to dock. Unaware of detonation event.

active_events: SCI-7817 debris field expanding. Three high-velocity fragments threatening outer docking ring perimeter.
COU-5016 secondary fire suppression active. Structural integrity climbing but aft compartments still unstable.
SAL-3188 debris recovery underway. First wreckage section secured via tractor beam.
Radiation contamination persists sectors one and two. ESC-3217 crew in sealed decontamination hold.
COU-2967 inbound to station. Unaware of emergency lockdown. Approach clearance pending.
Outer docking ring damage assessment required. Three debris fragments on intercept trajectory.
current_arc: Crisis stabilizing. Debris threats emerge. Inbound courier unaware of lockdown.
recent_transmissions: ESC-8643: Fragment one locked. Secondary chunks tracked. Intercept burn commencing in ninety seconds. Containment proceeding nominal.
TOWER: ESC-8643, confirm tertiary spread containment status—fragments diverging or stabilizing post-intercept burn?
AI: Debris spread stabilizing sector one. All vessels maintain current positions. Containment field holding at 78% integrity.
ESC-8643: Fragment one locked, secondary chunks tracked. Intercept burn commencing in ninety seconds. Spread stabilizing post-burn.
TOWER: SCI-7817, this is Tower. Cut reactor cascade immediately. Divert to Bay 2 or execute emergency deorbit. Ten minutes to impact unacceptable.
SCI-2245: Tower, confirm—detecting radiation spike from SCI-7817 approach vector inconsistent with containment harmonics. Reactor cascade?
AI: All vessels, SCI-7817 reactor cascade critical. Evacuate approach lanes immediately. Emergency docking Bay 2 available—SCI-7817 divert now or deorbit.
TOWER: SCI-7817, Bay 2 emergency dock available now. Cut reactor cascade and divert immediately or execute emergency deorbit. Nine minutes remaining.
SCI-2245: Tower, confirm radiation spike from SCI-7817 vector. Reactor cascade anomaly detected by our instruments?
SCI-2245: Tower, radiation signature confirms cascade instability. Recommend immediate evacuation protocol for all personnel in sectors one through three.
AI: All personnel to emergency stations. SCI-7817 detonation imminent. Containment field holding. Brace for impact.
AI: SCI-7817 detonation imminent. All vessels maintain current positions. Containment field at eighty-two percent integrity. Brace for impact.
AI: All personnel remain emergency stations. Detonation estimated thirty seconds. Containment field holding at eighty-two percent. Brace impact.
AI: SCI-7817 detonation occurred. Containment field absorbed primary blast. All personnel report status to nearest emergency station immediately.
TOWER: COU-5016, Bay 1 structural integrity critical. Evacuate to Bay 7 immediately. Welding teams stand by for transfer assistance.
AI: All vessels stand by. Radiation containment protocols active across sectors one and two. Debris recovery operations commencing. Report hazardous material encounters immediately.
AI: Radiation levels elevated in sectors one and two. All personnel complete decontamination before station access. Debris recovery priority.
TOWER: SAL-3188, debris recovery clearance granted. Sector two approach only. Report hazardous material encounters immediately.
ESC-8643: Sector one debris mapping complete. Tracking three hazardous material signatures. Recommend expanding restricted perimeter to Lane 1 northern approach.
TOWER: COU-2967, emergency lockdown in effect. Divert to holding pattern. Stand by for updated clearance.
